meta.homeDesc: Find trusted service providers in Norway: repairs, cleaning, construction, car service and more.
meta.servicesDesc: Browse service providers in Norway by city and category.
meta.contactDesc: Questions about Linkseta? Send us a message.
meta.becomeDesc: Join Linkseta and publish your services in Norway.
meta.termsDesc: Read the Linkseta terms of service and usage rules.
meta.privacyDesc: Read how Linkseta collects, uses and protects your data.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introText: By using Linkseta you agree to these terms.
terms.account1: You are responsible for keeping your account secure.
terms.account2: Do not use false or misleading information.
terms.account3: We may suspend accounts in case of abuse.
terms.content1: Illegal or misleading content is not allowed.
terms.content2: You are responsible for information in your listings.
terms.content3: Linkseta may remove listings that violate the rules.
terms.liabilityText: Linkseta is not responsible for provider actions or transactions between users.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.what3: Technical data for security (e.g., IP, user-agent).
privacy.whyText: We use data to run accounts, display listings and keep the platform secure.
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies for login and sessions. Analytics may be enabled later.
privacy.rights3: Opt out of marketing messages (if used).

footer.brandDesc: A trusted bridge between customers and specialists in Norway.

servicesPage.invalidPage: Invalid page number. Please try again.
servicesPage.empty: No services found for the selected filters.
servicesPage.emptyHint: Try changing the city, category, or search text.

hero.subtitle: Find service providers in Norway – browse profiles and contact them directly.
hero.title: Looking for the right <highlight>specialist?</highlight>

servicesHero.title: Services in your city in <mark>Norway</mark>
servicesHero.subtitle: Filter by <accent>city</accent>, <accent>category</accent> or <accent>keywords</accent> – find the right specialist in your area.

features.title: Why choose Linkseta?
features.subtitle: Fast search, clear structure, and a growing community.

items.title: A place for service providers in Norway
items.text: A new platform that connects specialists and customers in one place.

items.title: Looking or offering? Both fit here
items.text: Whether you are searching for a service or want to offer one – this place is for you.

items.title: We are building the community from scratch
items.text: This platform is growing – be one of the first and get more visibility.

cardGrid.empty: There are no visible services at the moment.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.subtitle: Do you have questions about the platform, services, or want to suggest an idea? Write to us — we will reply as soon as possible.

becomeProviderPage.title: Become a service provider on Linkseta
becomeProviderPage.lead: Choose a plan and get the ability to create your service listings so people in Norway can easily find you.
becomeProviderPage.noteText: Basic and Premium plans will be enabled later.
becomeProviderPage.inactivePlanTitle: This plan is not active yet
becomeProviderPage.trialSafetyNote: 💡 Free Trial is currently active. After 30 days, no payment will be charged automatically.
becomeProviderPage.smallInfo: After choosing Free Trial, you will be redirected to your account, where you can create your first listing and upload up to 5 photos in the gallery.

errors.chooseFailed: Could not select the plan. Please try again.

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: A practical plan for providers who want more active listings and more photos.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Made for providers who want stronger visibility and more chances to be noticed.

first.q: Will money be charged automatically after the Free Trial?
first.a: No. After the 30-day period ends, no payment will be charged automatically. You will continue only if you choose to.

second.q: Do I need to enter card details?
second.a: No. You can start the Free Trial without payment information.

third.q: How can I stop using it?
third.a: You can stop using it at any time – there are no obligations.

fourth.q: What do I get during the Free Trial?
fourth.a: You will be able to create 1 active listing and upload up to 5 photos to try the platform.

fifth.q: When will paid plans be available?
fifth.a: Basic and Premium plans will be available soon.

dashboardNewServicePage.subtitle: Fill in the form and create your service listing. You will be able to edit it later from your account.
